info.title: Data Docked Maritime API
info.description: A comprehensive maritime data API providing real-time vessel tracking, port operations, inspection data, and more. Access AIS data, vessel particulars, management information, and historical tracking data.

tags.name: Vessel Operations
tags.description: Vessel data, location, and tracking endpoints

tags.name: Port Operations
tags.description: Port calls and port data endpoints

get.description: Check your remaining API credits balance.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve comprehensive vessel information including particulars, location, engine data, management details, and port history. Costs 5 credits per request.

parameters.name: imo_or_mmsi
parameters.description: The IMO or MMSI number of the vessel you want to query.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve vessel specifications including dimensions, tonnage, build information, and capacity data. Costs 1 credit per request.

parameters.name: imo_or_mmsi
parameters.description: The IMO or MMSI number of the vessel you want to query.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve real-time vessel position including coordinates, speed, course, destination, and navigational status. Costs 1 credit per request.

parameters.name: imo_or_mmsi
parameters.description: The IMO or MMSI number of the vessel you want to query.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Query multiple vessel locations in a single request using comma-separated IMO or MMSI numbers. Maximum 50 vessels per request. Credits charged per vessel queried (1 credit per IMO/MMSI). Based on terrestrial AIS data only.

parameters.name: imo_or_mmsi
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of IMO or MMSI numbers (no spaces). Maximum 50 per request.

200.description: Successful response with multiple vessel locations

400.description: Bad request - Invalid format or exceeds 50 vessels

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve vessel engine specifications including fuel type, propeller information, engine type, builder, and power output. Costs 1 credit per request.

parameters.name: imo_or_mmsi
parameters.description: The IMO or MMSI number of the vessel you want to query.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve vessel management information including registered owner, ship manager, ISM manager, P&I club, and classification society. Costs 1 credit per request.

parameters.name: imo_or_mmsi
parameters.description: The IMO or MMSI number of the vessel you want to query.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Search for vessels by name and retrieve their IMO, MMSI, and basic specifications. Costs 1 credit per request.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the vessel you want to query. Spaces in vessel names must be URL encoded as _ (e.g., "DL ACACIA" becomes "DL_ACACIA").

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: Page number for pagination when multiple vessels share the same name. Defaults to 1.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve comprehensive vessel inspection data including Port State Control (PSC) inspections, classification surveys, certificates, P&I information, and ship history. Costs 3 credits per request.

parameters.name: imo
parameters.description: The IMO number of the vessel you want to query.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve current weather conditions at the vessel's location including temperature, wind speed, and wave height. Costs 1 credit per request.

parameters.name: imo
parameters.description: The IMO number of the vessel you want to query.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve historical vessel positions for voyage reconstruction. Returns up to 3000 positions per request. Historical data extends back 2 years. Pricing is based on the number of unique dates in results (5 credits per date). Based on terrestrial AIS data only.

parameters.name: imo_or_mmsi
parameters.description: The IMO or MMSI number of the vessel you want to retrieve historical positions for.

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Beginning of the date range in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: to_date
parameters.description: End of the date range in ISO 8601 format.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Find all vessels within a specified circular area. Based on terrestrial AIS data only. Costs 10 credits per request.

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: The center latitude coordinate for the search area (up to 1 decimal place).

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: The center longitude coordinate for the search area (up to 1 decimal place).

parameters.name: circle_radius
parameters.description: The search radius in kilometers (maximum 50km).

200.description: Successful response with vessels in area

400.description: Bad request - Invalid coordinates or radius

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve historical port call data for a specific vessel including arrival/departure times and port information. Costs 1 credit per request.

parameters.name: imo_or_mmsi
parameters.description: The IMO or MMSI number of the vessel you want to query.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve vessel traffic data for a specific port including arrivals, departures, expected vessels, and vessels currently in port. Costs 50 credits per request.

parameters.name: port_call
parameters.description: The UN/LOCODE of the port you want to query (e.g., ESBCN for Barcelona).

parameters.name: search_type
parameters.description: The type of search to perform.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination. Pagination starts with page number 1.

parameters.name: vessel_type
parameters.description: Filter results by vessel type.

200.description: Successful response with port traffic data

400.description: Bad request - Invalid port code or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

apiKey.name: x-api-key
apiKey.description: Your personal API key found in your profile dashboard at https://datadocked.com/dashboard/my_keys
